name: einherjer-blitz-3.0
description: Portal del Guerrero - Sistema de autenticación moderno

scripts.build-all: sass assets/scss/style.scss assets/css/main.css && sass assets/scss/dashboard.scss assets/css/dashboard.css
scripts.build-compressed: sass assets/scss/style.scss assets/css/main.css --style compressed && sass assets/scss/dashboard.scss assets/css/dashboard.css --style compressed

author: Einherjer Blitz Team
